question: What is the complete onboarding checklist?
answer:
**UX Designer Onboarding Checklist**

**INITIAL STEPS:**
1. Attend initial onboarding training by HR
2. Get in touch with your reporting manager
3. Contact your assigned 'Buddy'

**SYSTEM ACCESS:**
4. Check your personal email for:
   - US Domain ID
   - Temporary password
   - 4-digit IT desk pin (keep handy!)
   - (Copy also sent to your manager)

**DAY 1 - SETTLE IN:**
5. Get Temporary ID
   - Documents needed: Aadhar card + Vaccination certificate
6. Collect Laptop & Assets
   - Contact: Kiran (Kiran.Vk@carelon.com)
   - Location: 5th floor (Tech Bar), Bagmane office, Bangalore
   - Need: Approval email from HR & Manager
7. Meet your buddy and manager

**DAY 2-3 - CONNECT:**
8. Join team channels and introduce yourself
9. Attend team standup
10. Explore Figma workspace

**DAY 4-5 - CONTRIBUTE:**
11. Start first training module
12. Get project context from team
13. Attend your first design sync

**ONGOING TASKS:**
14. Apply for Permanent ID Card
    - Check if HR raised request
    - Get manager approval
    - Raise building access if needed (Insync portal)
15. Prepare 1-slide PPT for team introduction
16. Request VPN Access
    - Raise IT Service Connect request
    - Manager will approve
17. Complete Training:
    - Mandatory training (Workday Learning)
    - Figma training (UX team)
    - Healthcare System Structure document
18. Get TCP Access
    - Get PRJ Code from manager

**KEY PORTALS & TOOLS:**
- **Pulse Portal:** pulse.elevancehealth.com (HR, IT, Business tasks)
- **Workday:** Bank details, Time entry, Leave, Goals
- **Service Now:** Elevancehealth.service-now.com (IT requests)
- **BCP/Insync:** Access requests (Building, Asset, Relocation)
- **IT Service Connect:** Software licenses, ID cards, Building access
- **Pulse Point Spaces:** Reserve office seats

**TRANSPORT SETUP:**
- Hyderabad: DL-TransportHYD@carelon.com
- Bangalore MTP: dl-TransportMTP@carelon.com
- Bangalore Bagmane: dl-transportxenon@carelon.com
- Gurugram: dl-TransportGUR@carelon.com
- Install: Move Insync app for cab booking

**FOOD:**
- Install Hunger Box app
- Login with Domain ID

**DESIGN SYSTEM:**
- Library to use: Lean IDS
- Contact: Carelon DS UX Team channel

**TROUBLESHOOTING:**
- Password reset: IT Enterprise
- Install: PingID app
- Questions: Ask your Buddy, Manager, or Carelon DS UX Team channel
